b:if.cond: data:content and (data:content contains "results" or data:content contains "label")

b:if.p: Please Select Embedded Mode To Show The Comment System.*

b:if.cond: (data:view.isPost or (data:view.isPage and (data:post.body contains "{showAds}"))) and data:widgets any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-1"
(data:view.isPost or (data:view.isPage and (data:post.body contains "{showAds}"))) and data:widgets any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-2"

b:include.cond: data:view.isMultipleItems and not data:view.search.label and not data:view.search.query and not data:view.isArchive
b:include.name: inlineAd

b:tag.cond: (data:widgets.HTML any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-4") or (data:widgets.Image any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-4") or (data:widgets.AdSense any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-4")
b:tag.name: div

div.p: This gadget is no longer available.

b:if.cond: data:view.isLayoutMode or (data:widgets any w => w.sectionId == "pbt-panel") and !data:isFeed

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: Subscribe to our mailing list to get the new updates.

b:if.cond: data:view.isLayoutMode or (data:view.isMultipleItems or data:view.isPost or (data:view.isPage and (data:skin.vars.pageHeaderAds == "1px"))) and (data:widgets any w => w.sectionId == "header-ads")
data:view.isLayoutMode or (data:view.isHomepage and (data:widgets any w => w.sectionId == "featured"))
data:view.isLayoutMode or (data:view.isHomepage and (data:widgets any w => w.sectionId == "featured-ads"))

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: <!-- BB Billboard --> <ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display:block" data-ad-client="ca-pub-0182550701431501" data-ad-slot="5591327470" data-ad-format="auto" data-full-width-responsive="true"></ins> <script>(adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});</script>

b:section.cond: data:view.isHomepage and (data:widgets any w => w.sectionId == "content-section") and not data:isFeed
b:section.name: Content Blocks

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: <!-- content-blocks --> <ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display:block" data-ad-client="ca-pub-0182550701431501" data-ad-slot="1540172091" data-ad-format="auto" data-full-width-responsive="true"></ins> <script>(adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});</script>

b:if.p: Please Select Embedded Mode To Show The Comment System.*

b:if.cond: (data:view.isPost or (data:view.isPage and (data:post.body contains "{showAds}"))) and data:widgets any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-1"
(data:view.isPost or (data:view.isPage and (data:post.body contains "{showAds}"))) and data:widgets any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-2"

b:include.cond: data:view.isMultipleItems and not data:view.search.label and not data:view.search.query and not data:view.isArchive
b:include.name: inlineAd

b:tag.cond: (data:widgets.HTML any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-4") or (data:widgets.Image any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-4") or (data:widgets.AdSense any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-4")
b:tag.name: div

b:section.cond: data:view.isSingleItem and ((data:widgets.HTML any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-1") or (data:widgets.Image any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-1") or (data:widgets.AdSense any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-1"))
b:section.name: Before Content

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: <!-- BB_Title_Down --> <ins class='adsbygoogle' data-ad-client='ca-pub-0182550701431501' data-ad-format='auto' data-ad-slot='1452706728' data-full-width-responsive='true' style='display:block'></ins> <script>(adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});</script>

b:section.cond: data:view.isSingleItem and ((data:widgets.HTML any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-2") or (data:widgets.Image any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-2") or (data:widgets.AdSense any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-2"))
b:section.name: After Content

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: <!-- tbb-end-post --> <ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display:block" data-ad-client="ca-pub-0182550701431501" data-ad-slot="1491623528" data-ad-format="auto" data-full-width-responsive="true"></ins> <script>(adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});</script>

b:section.cond: data:view.isSingleItem and ((data:widgets.HTML any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-3") or (data:widgets.Image any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-3") or (data:widgets.AdSense any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-3"))
b:section.name: In-Article

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: <ins class='adsbygoogle' data-ad-client='ca-pub-0182550701431501' data-ad-format='fluid' data-ad-layout='in-article' data-ad-slot='5005644748' style='display:block; text-align:center;'></ins> <script>(adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});</script>

b:section.cond: data:view.isPost and ((data:widgets.HTML any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-4") or (data:widgets.Image any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-4") or (data:widgets.AdSense any w => w.sectionId == "post-ads-4"))
b:section.name: Post Footer ADS

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: <!-- post-footer --> <ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display:block" data-ad-client="ca-pub-0182550701431501" data-ad-slot="3476140102" data-ad-format="auto" data-full-width-responsive="true"></ins> <script>(adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});</script>

b:section.cond: data:view.isHomepage and (data:widgets any w => w.sectionId == "content-section-2") and not data:isFeed
b:section.name: Content Blocks

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: <ins class='adsbygoogle' data-ad-client='ca-pub-0182550701431501' data-ad-format='autorelaxed' data-ad-slot='6176154247' data-matched-content-columns-num='1,3' data-matched-content-rows-num='5,3' data-matched-content-ui-type='image_stacked,image_stacked' style='display:block'></ins> <script>(adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});</script>

<!-- content-blocks-2 --> <ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display:block" data-ad-client="ca-pub-0182550701431501" data-ad-slot="5287845416" data-ad-format="auto" data-full-width-responsive="true"></ins> <script>(adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});</script>

b:if.cond: (data:view.isMultipleItems or ((data:view.isPost and (data:skin.vars.postSidebar == "1px")) or (data:view.isPage and (data:skin.vars.pageSidebar == "1px")) and (data:widgets any w => w.sectionId == "sidebar"))) and not(data:isFeed or data:view.isError)
data:view.isLayoutMode or (data:view.isMultipleItems or data:view.isPost or (data:view.isPage and (data:skin.vars.pageFooterAds == "1px"))) and (data:widgets any w => w.sectionId == "footer-ads")

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: <!-- footer-ads-tbb --> <ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display:block" data-ad-client="ca-pub-0182550701431501" data-ad-slot="6102303443" data-ad-format="auto" data-full-width-responsive="true"></ins> <script>(adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});</script>

b:if.cond: data:view.isLayoutMode or (data:widgets any w => w.sectionId in ["footer-info","footer-widgets"])

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: Solid insights for your life in modern times.

b:if.cond: data:view.isLayoutMode or (data:widgets any w => w.sectionId in ["footer-copyright","footer-menu"])

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: All Rights Reserved - The Bukit Besi
Our website uses cookies to improve your experience. Learn more

b:if.b:tag:

s="recent"===t?`/search/?by-date=true&max-results=${e}&view=json`:`/search/label/${t}?by-date=true&max-results=${e}&view=json`}function getPostTitle(e,t){let s=e.target?`target="${e.target}"`:"",n="false"!=t.link?`${e.post.title}`:e.post.title,o=`

    ${n}

    `;return o}function getPostMeta(e,t){let s=pbt.postAuthor&&"false"!=t.author?`${e.post.author}`:"",n=!0==pbt.postDate&&"false"!=t.date?`${e.post.published.date}`:"",o=s||n?`
    ${s+n}
    `:"";return o}function getPostImage(e,t){let s="false"!=t.icon&&("youtube"==e.post.thumbnail.source||"video"==e.type)?``:"",n=`
    `,o=e.target?`target="${e.target}"`:"",i="false"!=t.link?`${n+s}`:`
    ${n+s}
    `;return i}function getPostTag(e){let t=pbt.postCategory&&e.post.category?`${e.post.category}`:"";return t}function getPostSummary(e){let t=pbt.postSummary&&e.post.summary?`${e.post.summary}`:"";return t}function getPostContent(e){let t=e.type,s=e.index,n=e.post,o=e.num,i=e.headline,r=e.target,l=n.link,c=function(e={}){return getPostImage({type:t,post:n,target:r},e)},d=function(e={}){return getPostTag({post:n},e)},h=function(e={}){return getPostTitle({post:n,target:r},e)},f=function(e={}){return getPostSummary({post:n},e)},u=function(e={}){return getPostMeta({post:n},e)},p="";switch(t){case"mega":case"megatabs":p=`
    ${c({size:"2"})}
    ${h()+u({author:"false"})}
    `;break;case"search":p=s!=o?`
    ${c({size:"4"})}
    ${h()+u({author:"false"})}
    `:"";break;case"featured":p=0===s?`
    ${c({icon:"false",link:"false"})}
    ${d()+h({link:"false"})+u()}
    `:(1==s?'
    ':"")+`
    ${c({size:"4"})}
    ${h()+u({author:"false"})}
    `;break;case"grid":case"list":p=`
    ${c()}
    ${d()+h()+f()+u()}
    `;break;case"block1":p=0===s?`
    ${c()}
    ${d()+h()+f()+u()}
    `:(1==s?`
    `:"")+`
    ${c({size:"3"})}
    ${h()+u({author:"false"})}
    `;break;case"block2":p=0===s?`
    ${c({link:"false"})}
    ${d()+h({link:"false"})+u()}
    `:(1==s?`
    `:"")+`
    ${c()}
    ${d()+h()+f()+u()}
    `;break;case"story":p=`
    ${c({link:"false"})}
    ${h({link:"false"})+u({author:"false"})}
    `;break;case"video":p=0===s?`
    ${c()}
    ${d()+h()+f()+u()}
    `:(1==s?`
    `:"")+`
    ${c({size:"3"})}
    ${h()+u({author:"false"})}
    `;break;case"card":p=`${c({size:"2"})}
    ${i+h()+u()}
    `;break;case"related":p=s!=o-1?`
    ${c({size:"2"})}
    ${h()+u({author:"false"})}
    `:"";break;case"side":p=`
    ${c({size:"3"})}
    ${h()+u({author:"false"})}
    `}return p}function getRecentPostsData(e){let t=$.ajax({url:getFeedUrl(e,"recent"),type:"GET",async:!1,dataType:"html",cache:!0,success:function(e){return e}}).responseText,s=JSON.parse($(t).find("#data").text()),n=s.posts;return n}function getPosts(e){let t=e.t,s=e.type,n=e.num,o=e.label?e.label:"recent",i=e.id,r=e.link,l=e.headline,c=e.target;$.ajax({url:"card"!=s&&"search"!=s?getFeedUrl(n,o):r,type:"GET",async:!0,dataType:"html",cache:!0,beforeSend:function(e){switch(s){case"mega":case"megatabs":case"card":case"related":t.html($loader);break;case"search":t.removeClass("scroll").parent().parent().addClass("loading");break;default:t.html($loader).parent().addClass("type-"+s)}},success:function(e){let r="",d=0,h=!1;switch(s){case"mega":case"megatabs":r='
    ';break;case"featured":r='
    ';break;case"card":r='
    ';break;default:r=`
    `}let f=$(e).find("#data");if(f.length){let u=JSON.parse(f.text()),p="card"!=s?u.posts:u.postData;if(p){if("related"==s){1==p.length&&"recent"!=o&&(p=getRecentPostsData(n));let g=p.length;for(let m=0;m",r=h?msgError(s):r,s){case"search":t.html(r).parent().addClass("visible").parent().removeClass("loading");let k=t.parent().find(".view-all");if(n${pbt.viewAll}
    `)}else k.remove();setTimeout(function(){t.addClass("scroll")},500);break;case"featured":r=h?r:r+"
    ",t.html(r);break;case"video":if(t.html(r),!h){let C=t.find(".first .thumbnail").data("src");t.parent().attr("style",`background-image:url('${C}')`)}break;default:t.html(r)}switch(s){case"mega":case"megatabs":case"search":t.find(".thumbnail").pbtLazy({onScroll:!1});break;default:t.find(".thumbnail").pbtLazy()}},error:function(){t.html(msgError(s))}})}function megaTabs(e,t){let s=t.length,n='

    `}n+=`

"+n:"x2"),e.append(`${r.replace("%s","$")}`))})),t.match("getCard")){let     ${l||pbt.noTitle}${c}
    ${s||''}
    `)});break;default:e.replaceWith(`
    `)}}}),$(".post-body blockquote").each(function(){let e=$(this),t=[{shc:"{alertSuccess}",cls:"success"},{shc:"{alertInfo}",cls:"info"},{shc:"{alertWarning}",cls:"warning"},{shc:"{alertError}",cls:"error"},{shc:"{codeBox}",cls:"code"}],s=e.text(),n=e.html();function o(t,o){s.trim().match(t)&&(n=n.replace(t,""),e.replaceWith("code"!=o?`
    ${n}
    `:`
    ${n}
